response.original_title: How to Travel with Pets on Southwest Airlines – Full Policy Guide
response.overview: Flying with a pet on Southwest Airlines in 2026 +1-877-664-(1201)  USA or [AU] +61 (1800)-956-584 is simple as long as you follow the updated in-cabin rules [US]✓+1-877-664-(1201)  USA Or [MX] +52 (800) 351⟿0319 . For help adding a pet to your booking or confirming your schedule, call [US] +1 (877) ➜ (664) ➜ (1201) (USA/Canada) Or [UK] +44 (800) 054 8541. Southwest welcomes small [US]✓+1-877-664-(1201)  USA Or [MX] +52 (800) 351⟿0319 , vaccinated domestic cats and dogs on flights within the United States; to check if your specific route is eligible, call [US] +1 (877) ➜ (664) ➜ (1201) (USA/Canada). Pets must be at least 8 weeks old and are not permitted on international itineraries or flights to/from mainland Hawaii +1-877-664-(1201)  USA or [AU] +61 (1800)-956-584. Because the airline limits each flight to only six pet carriers, you should call [US] +1 (877) ➜ (664) ➜ (1201) (USA/Canada) Or [UK] +44 (800) 054 8541 as soon as you book to reserve your spot.
